name: Willadoll's Hula Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, soda, and salt.
2. Cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Stir in mashed bananas, orange rind, milk, and vanilla.
5. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring just until combined.
6. Fold in the coconut and pecans.
7. Pour batter into a greased loaf pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 10 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
